meta.title: PID Controller
meta.description: Canonical PID v1 control loop with manual/auto modes, bounded output, monitors, traces and maintenance operations.

kp.title: Proportional Gain
kp.description: Proportional gain for the control loop.

pv_filter_tau_ms.title: PV Filter Tau
pv_filter_tau_ms.description: Optional first-order PV filter time constant.

temperature_loop.title: Temperature Loop
temperature_loop.description: Preset for thermal processes with moderate inertia.

meta.title: Pulse Flowmeter
meta.description: Universal pulse-driven flowmeter with hall, analog-threshold, and remote pulse modes.

meta.title: Run Hours Counter
meta.description: Accumulates machine runtime from a normalized active signal and exposes service-ready totals.

persist_enabled.title: Persist Enabled
persist_enabled.description: Stores accumulated runtime in non-volatile storage.

persist_period_s.title: Persist Period
persist_period_s.description: How often accumulated runtime is flushed when persistence is enabled.

rounding_mode.title: Rounding Mode
rounding_mode.description: Controls how service-facing hour totals are rounded.

min_active_time_ms.title: Min Active Time
min_active_time_ms.description: Shorter active pulses are ignored as noise.

meta.title: Maintenance Counter
meta.description: Evaluates accumulated usage against a service interval and exposes due and overdue maintenance states.

warning_before.title: Warning Before
warning_before.description: How much usage remains when the warning state becomes active.

overdue_margin.title: Overdue Margin
overdue_margin.description: Extra usage beyond the service interval before overdue becomes active.

auto_rollover.title: Auto Rollover
auto_rollover.description: Automatically starts the next interval after reset or completion.

persist_enabled.title: Persist Enabled
persist_enabled.description: Stores reset baseline and acknowledge state.

meta.title: Threshold Monitor
meta.description: Monitors a numeric value against high, low, or window limits with hysteresis and source timeout handling.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Selects high, low, or window evaluation.

threshold_a.title: Threshold A
threshold_a.description: Primary threshold or lower window edge.

threshold_b.title: Threshold B
threshold_b.description: Secondary threshold or upper window edge.

latch_alarm.title: Latch Alarm
latch_alarm.description: Keeps alarm active until the latch is reset.

timeout_ms.title: Source Timeout
timeout_ms.description: Timeout before source quality is considered stale.

meta.title: Run Hours Service Preset
meta.description: Reusable configured preset for a persisted run-hours counter.

meta.title: Saved Maintenance Service Preset
meta.description: Project-saved configured maintenance preset sharing the same template contract.

meta.title: Boiler Supervisor Skeleton
meta.description: Boiler PLC-part skeleton assembled from frozen library objects, templates, and monitoring primitives.

demo_defaults.title: Demo Defaults
demo_defaults.description: Small package-level preset for overview and flattening checks.

boundary_notes: This skeleton remains non-safety and excludes burner permissives, flame supervision, and shutdown logic.
Package is authoring-only and must flatten into ordinary effective instances, connections, monitors, and operations.
